title: Scaling the Horizon, Not the Parameters: Reaching Trillion-Parameter Performance with a 35B Agent
innovation_summary: Scaling the Horizon, Not the Parameters: Reaching Trillion-Parameter Performance with a 35B Agent: We introduce Agents-A1, a 35B Mixture-of-Experts Agentic Model that reaches trillion-parameter-level performance by scaling the agent horizon.
